_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: All significant upregulated and downregulated DEGs with a minimum log-fold change of 0.25 were then analyzed using the fgsea package against GO-Biological Processes (GOBP) gene sets
details: Successfully analyzed significant upregulated and downregulated DEGs with minimum log-fold change of 0.25 against GO-Biological Processes gene sets, revealing distinct enriched pathways for each fibroblast cluster
